title: あくまで薦められただけ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the academy when I hear
someone talking.
Siiigh... My heart's pounding... I wonder if they'll confess their love to each other after this part.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow the voice and find Mejiro Ryan hiding out
of sight, secretly reading a manga.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Man, this artist's stuff is the best... All right! I'm
gonna get the whole series and binge-read 'em
all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what the?! H-how long have you been
standing there?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I-it's a romance manga but, uhhh... Oh, yeah! A
friend of mine suggested I check out this series,
and I didn't wanna be rude and not read it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I came across an old series by my
favorite artist and decided to buy it or anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, I don't usually read romance
manga! I mean, a gym rat like me liking romance
manga? Pfft, no way, right? Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The only reason I was thinking of bingeing the
whole series is so I can tell my friend what I think
about it ASAP... Honest!
choice_data_list: It'd be better to pace yourself.
You'll exhaust yourself trying to binge it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If I don't get enough sleep, then I
won't be able to train to my full potential...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna read it, but I guess I'll hold off... Huh,
that's kinda like holding off on making a move
during a race to save energy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll read at a reasonable pace! But don't
forget—I'm only reading it because my friend
recommended it to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's reading or racing, pacing yourself is
extremely important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Aww, but I really wanna read it all—er, I mean... I
really wanna tell my friend what I think about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'll adjust my schedule so that I can rest up
after my binge-reading session!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It sucks to have to do this, but things should work
out if I move my morning weight training to
another time slot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I still think not binge-reading the series would be the most sensible option, but at least she's finding time for a proper rest.
